items.title: Function components: reject the invalid model
items.prompt: Which statement correctly resolves this React: Component-Based Browser Applications misconception? A component function runs once when mounted and retains its local variables forever.
hints: Compare both options with platform semantics and observable user or browser evidence.

feedback.correct: Correct. Component functions can run repeatedly; persist changing UI data in state or refs, not ordinary render locals.
feedback.incorrect: That preserves the misconception. Component functions can run repeatedly; persist changing UI data in state or refs, not ordinary render locals.

criteria.description: Selects the source-linked React: Component-Based Browser Applications correction rather than the documented misconception.
